brand: Boston's The Gourmet Pizza Restaurant & Sports Bar

exhibits.name: State Administrators and Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: Lists state administrators for CA, HI, IL, IN, MD, MI, MN, NY, ND, RI, SD, VA, WA, WI

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Audited by Moss Adams. December 31, 2024, 2023, 2022. GOING CONCERN opinion. Image-based (no text layer) — rendered via pdftoppm. Includes balance sheet, income statement, changes in partners' capital, cash flow, and notes to financial statements.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Standard franchise agreement. 31 sections. Key provisions summarized in Item 17. Full clause-by-clause analysis deferred to A2 depth pass.

exhibits.name: Area Development Agreement
exhibits.notes: For multi-unit development. Includes development schedule, territory provisions, termination triggers.

exhibits.name: List of Current and Former Franchisees/Area Developers
exhibits.notes: PII content — not extracted per PII rules. No confidentiality provisions restricting franchisee speech.

exhibits.name: Operations Manual Table of Contents
exhibits.notes: Table of contents for ~1,675 page electronic Operations Manual (Bostonlink.org)

exhibits.name: State Addenda and Agreement Riders
exhibits.notes: 16 states with addenda. Key overrides: forum selection, choice of law, noncompete limitations, general release restrictions, fee deferral (IL, MD, ND, SD, WA), liquidated damages limitations, termination protections.

exhibits.name: Contracts for use with the Boston's Restaurant Franchise

sub_exhibits.name: Lease Addendum / Collateral Assignment of Lease

exhibits.notes: Includes guaranty (spousal), system protection, noncompete, ACH, lease addendum, technology agreements.

exhibits.name: State Effective Dates
exhibits.notes: Lists effective dates for state registrations
